title: More Trapdoors
description: Increases the amount of trapdoors you get per craft
body:
![More Trapdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4c3698aa74b38b661494b1b7e49a700fe6e057a.png)

### Very simply doubles the amount of trapdoors you get per craft.
- Wooden Trapdoors: 2 --> 4
- Cooper Trapdoor: 2 --> 4
- Iron Trapdoor: 1 --> 2
